recentTweets.text: The Supreme Court’s latest decision is a step backward for voting rights and fair representation. Every American deserves an equal voice at the ballot box. I stand with civil rights leaders calling for action to protect voters and uphold our democracy. Read:

Today, I proudly celebrate the 50th anniversary of Prison Fellowship, Second Chance Month, and the introduction of the Second Chance Month Resolution. Second chances help individuals rebuild their lives, strengthen families, and make communities safer. https://t.co/DEoFDPQRqk

January isn't just a new year; it’s a time to prioritize our well-being. This month, I’m highlighting: Cervical Health & Glaucoma screenings, Birth Defects prevention & education, Stalking awareness & survivor support the urgent need for blood donors. https://t.co/DPvWRQrRsC

Rep. Danny K. Davis joined Illinois’ Democratic congressional delegation in demanding the Trump Administration immediately comply with federal law and release $1 BILLION in frozen funding for child care and essential services. https://t.co/MYn2lHSKln

Today, we honor Dr. King not with words, but with service. As we face renewed attacks on our democracy, we remember that progress is never inevitable. Let’s organize and recommit to the "Beloved Community" he envisioned. https://t.co/vLb3Il0dbq

This week, I fought to hold HHS accountable for illegally halting $10 b for child care & services in IL, MN, CA, CO, & NY and child care funds across the US. The GOP rejected my effort to penalize HHS’s illegal actions. Thank you AG Raoul for suing to stop the cruel GOP efforts. https://t.co/uG32JwsSh7

Thousands of children and families are being harmed out of political revenge. It’s unpresidential and un-American, yet HHS has illegally stopped $1 b of our funds.

HHS must immediately release the $1 b in child care and social services funding that our state is rightfully owed. https://t.co/0b7fUVNqrv

ACA Extension: Today’s victory proves a simple truth: when Democrats stay unified, listen to the people, & remain focused on results, we win. A people united will never be defeated. Democrats are on a roll! We are fighting for ordinary, everyday Americans. https://t.co/N1GNsNnmKe

Congressman Danny Davis: I have no respect for authoritarian rule, anywhere.
President Trump does not get to decide war, choose foreign leaders, or bypass Congress.
That’s not democracy. That’s executive overreach. https://t.co/v3LEwijbnN

January is #NationalMentoringMonth. I’ve always said that our youth are the best of who we are. To everyone in the 7th District who takes the time to guide, teach, and inspire a young person: Thank you. You are building the future of Chicago.  #MentorshipMatters #BeAMentor #IL07 https://t.co/FP5gYzN4La

As we enter 2026, I remain more committed than ever to fighting for our youth, expanding healthcare, and creating opportunity for all. Wishing you a year filled with peace, health, and progress. Let’s keep moving forward together! #HappyNewYear #Chicago #Service https://t.co/XSkPeRxbgs

Wishing all my constituents a peaceful holiday season. It remains a distinct honor to serve as your Representative in Congress. May the spirit of community stay with you and your families throughout the coming year. https://t.co/X0K836vIK7

The U.S. Department of Justice's opinion declaring Minority Serving Institution programs unconstitutional denies both the constitutionality and the necessity of targeted efforts designed to expand educational access for historically marginalized communities. https://t.co/lKl99SEvjj

I’m joining my Democratic colleagues to demand House Republicans vote NOW to extend ACA tax credits. GOP inaction means health insurance premiums will skyrocket on Jan 1. We need a clean extension today to keep healthcare affordable. 📉🏥 #Healthcare #ACA https://t.co/PvJXSDwrJ1

I am very honored that the American Ambulance Association presented me with a beautiful award for my strong support for emergency medical services.  These wonderful professionals do amazing work for our communities. https://t.co/PCLLgP4FZ1

I am deeply honored to have received a Hill Champion award from the National Minority AIDS Council.  We must continue to sustain and grow federal funding for HIV prevention, treatment, research, and community engagement. https://t.co/Lmt2Uuzp6B

Antisemitic violence at Bondi Beach and the tragedy at Brown University are attacks on our democratic values. Hate has no place in our democracy. Congressman Danny K. Davis remains committed to protecting civil rights and keeping our communities safe. https://t.co/ZA9BIidfJ8

Seventy years ago, the Montgomery Bus Boycott ignited a new chapter in the Civil Rights Movement. Today, we salute the courage of those activists and recommit ourselves to the ongoing fight for justice and equality. https://t.co/0e3R0Jc4Aw

Today, we remember the friends, neighbors, and loved ones taken by HIV/AIDS. In Congress, I remain committed to ending stigma, expanding access to treatment, and supporting the search for a cure. https://t.co/hQoki1skjR

Small businesses are the heartbeat of our communities. This Small Business Saturday, I encourage everyone to shop local and support the entrepreneurs and workers who keep our neighborhoods strong. #ShopSmall #SmallBusinessSaturday #SupportLocal https://t.co/YTjyUlJ26w

Wishing everyone a safe and joyful Thanksgiving! May this season remind us to give thanks for our loved ones and extend compassion to those in need.
#Thanksgiving #Gratitude #Community https://t.co/Vrzta8f0at

Violence against women and girls is a human rights crisis we must confront together. On this day, I stand with survivors and advocates working tirelessly to end gender-based violence.
#EndViolenceAgainstWomen #Equality #IL07 https://t.co/pnEoRn4HZr

Today, we remember the lives lost to anti-transgender violence and recommit ourselves to creating a world where everyone can live safely and authentically. We must always stand up for dignity and equality for all. #TDOR #TransRightsAreHumanRights #EqualityForAll https://t.co/GZMmwetWo1

Tolerance is the foundation of peace and understanding. On this International Day of Tolerance, I reaffirm my commitment to promoting inclusion, respect, and equality for all people.
#DayOfTolerance #UnityInDiversity https://t.co/S2Dk6LLW88

Kindness is something we can all give, and it costs nothing. A kind word or small gesture can change someone’s whole day. Let’s all do our part to spread a little more compassion today.
#WorldKindnessDay #BeKind #Community https://t.co/O4NbP9BrcE

To all the veterans who have served this country, thank you. Your courage, your service, and your sacrifice mean everything. Let’s make sure every veteran gets the care, respect, and opportunities they’ve earned.
#VeteransDay #ThankAVet #ServiceAndSacrifice https://t.co/JaFxlVXt49

Today, we celebrate 250 years of courage and service from the United States Marine Corps. To every Marine, thank you for your strength, discipline, and sacrifice. Our nation is better because of you.
#MarineCorpsBirthday #SemperFi #ThankYouForYourService https://t.co/LGGT25PnDH

Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s leadership has shaped generations. As the first woman Speaker, she broke barriers, built coalitions, and delivered for working families. Her legacy will endure. Thank you, Madam Speaker, for your service and friendship. — @RepDannyDavis

Join Congressman Danny K. Davis for a Virtual Town Hall Meeting on the government shutdown and its impact on our community. Sunday at 2:00 p.m.  Join online: https://t.co/CMhFwhW1E7

No one should face this shutdown alone — let’s stand together. https://t.co/TO9wuIP26g
State-by-State Premium Increases if Enhancements Expire. The GOP Healthcare crisis is impacting Illinois. https://t.co/kDw8JpmIsx

“Share your Story” Government Shutdown” What it Means for Families in the 7th Congressional District:
"There has been a dramatic increase in food prices, and health insurance has increased. Also, what can a disabled senior citizen do if President Trump remains in office?" https://t.co/RfAwplvEbU

Government Shutdown: A Resident’s Story “I’m 78, living on Social Security in low-income housing. I pay my own electric bill and rely on SNAP for food. The hardships Trump and Republicans are forcing on seniors like me are dangerous to our well-being.” https://t.co/XtkzJN25Vx

I relied on the Federal Pell Grant and Illinois MAP Grant to attend college. Now, I'm in my last semester of college, I need to take out student loans and rely on credit cards. Sad. https://t.co/RXWcOCtxKF

“Share Your Story”  Government Shutdown: What It Means for Families in IL-07

"Quite frankly, this information has left me and mine traumatized. We are in a precarious position already living in conditions that are not the best, then have to be on guard for the healthcare crisis. https://t.co/GQG5sQz2n9

“Share Your Story”  Government Shutdown: What It Means for Families in IL-07

"Quite frankly, this information has left me and mine traumatized. We are in a precarious position already living in conditions that are not the best, then have to be on guard for the healthcare crisis. https://t.co/PrFCgQEOWU

CONGRESSMAN DANNY K. DAVIS WARNS OF RISING HEALTH CARE PREMIUMS AND SNAP CUTS IMPACTING FAMILIES IN ILLINOIS AND THE 7TH CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT: Will Launch New “Tell Your Story” Website Feature as Benefits Face Deadlines. For more information: https://t.co/oATOhYXk3g

Congressman Davis: The GOP’s “Big Ugly Law” means IL-07 families pay $900 more in ACA premiums, 13,800 federal jobs at risk, and 535,000 IL residents losing health insurance. Healthcare is a right—not a privilege. We must reinstate Medicaid & fund our gov’t.
STATEMENT FROM CONGRESSMAN DANNY K. DAVIS: SUPPORTS THE MAYOR OF BROADVIEW, ILLINOIS, REGARDING ICE ACTIONS. For full statement: https://t.co/1TVfEXBUKi https://t.co/RH4rkP67Wj
STATEMENT FROM CONGRESSMAN DANNY K. DAVIS: SUPPORTS THE MAYOR OF BROADVIEW, ILLINOIS, REGARDING ICE ACTIONS. For full statement: https://t.co/1TVfEXBUKi
CONGRESSMAN DAVIS REMEMBERS 9/11, CALLS FOR RENEWED COMMITMENT TO UNITY, ACCOUNTABILITY, AND PROGRESS. To see the full statement: https://t.co/1TVfEXBUKi

Remember the assassination of Emmett Till 70 years ago. Make sure you are registered and vote.
Danny K. Davis 7th District, IL

“Release the Money Now”: Congressman Danny K. Davis, Local Leaders Demand FEMA Relief for Chicago Flood Victims, State Rep. Ford: National Guard should be deployed to assist residents with flooded basements. For message: https://t.co/1TVfEXBUKi https://t.co/qPBwoOVEqd

On Tuesday, August 26, 2025, CONGRESSMAN DANNY K. DAVIS AND STATE REP. LA SHAWN K. FORD TO HOLD PRESS CONFERENCE ON FEMA FUNDING IN ILLINOIS: Residents want FEMA and HUD funding, not the National Guard https://t.co/iOCKJnaPen

Last Week, I proudly joined with members of President Franklin D. Roosevelt’s family, the current SSA Commissioner Frank Bisignano, former SSA Commissioner Martin O’Malley, and the National Academy of Social Insurance to commemorate the 90th anniversary of Social Security. https://t.co/s2jfDd6KXc

Proud to serve as a dissertation committee member for Dr. Tumia Romero, my Chief of Staff, whose research breaks ground on the unique challenges faced by African American females reentering society after incarceration. Read more: https://t.co/l8DfZkrmqk https://t.co/aTKetO3YhJ

I rise in strong opposition & could never vote for this Big, Bad, Inhumane & Ugly bill because it will wreck health care delivery, take food from hungry children, sentence seniors to early deaths, end jobs, and ruin our economy just to give the super rich more power & wealth. https://t.co/gUTll3yReI

Medicaid is NOT a piggy bank for billionaires!  I reject the cruel GOP bill that makes poor people poorer, sick people sicker, and hungry people hungrier.  Call your Republican Senators to tell them to REJECT the cruel GOP Budget plan -  to vote NO on the GOP Tax Scam 2022243121 https://t.co/RLWk4lQJ3m

Today, I reminded the new Social Security Commissioner that he has a responsibility to protect Social Security for every American. I made clear that I will fight to protect Social Security & SSI benefits for seniors, children, people with disabilities, & serious illnesses. https://t.co/fKjc77KwCn

Once again, Trump acts like a king—ignoring Congress, dismissing intelligence, and pushing us toward war. The people want peace and diplomacy, not bombs. Let’s negotiate, not destroy. Like the song, War: What is it good for? Absolutely nothing. #PeaceNotWar #DiplomacyFirst https://t.co/5mHmQV7SSS

Celebrate fathers & uplift our neighborhoods! Join Rep. Danny K. Davis on Sat. June 21 for the Annual #Fatherhood in the Neighborhood BLOCK by BLOCK event!

📍2815 W. 5th Ave, Chicago
🍴 Free food, raffle, & role model recognitions!
🕚 11AM–4:30PM
#DannyKDavis #BlackFathersLead https://t.co/bmSQsHxCBe

Juneteenth is a day of celebration—and a call to action. Freedom delayed is freedom denied. Let us honor the past by building a future rooted in justice, equity, and truth. #Juneteenth #IL07 #CongressmanDannyDavis https://t.co/Jo9BPe7KLR
Congressman Danny K. Davis and the Illinois Delegation Urge Accountability Following Blocked Visit to Broadview ICE Center, Raise Concerns Over Trump-Era Policies https://t.co/TB0c8V3a1U

U. S. Representative Danny K. Davis will convene a virtual  "Ask the Congressman" Town hall meeting. This meeting is scheduled for June 18, 2025, at 6:00 p.m CST. RSVP here: https://t.co/GxAb2plfYb https://t.co/5KpK0S8aDh

In the Ways & Means hearing, I stood against the GOP's cruel "One Big Beautiful" bill. It rips health care from 16M Americans—including 498K in IL—slashes child & family programs, and gives tax breaks to the rich. It's Robin Hood in reverse. I reject it. #ProtectFamilies https://t.co/GaMKXLQv86

Congressman Danny K. Davis was temporarily waived onto the House Oversight Committee to participate in proceedings concerning Gov. JB Pritzker. While not a standing member of the committee, he was granted permission to join due to the issue’s relevance to IL & his constituents. https://t.co/MnG1Jn8e4r

To the family of the Honorable Charles B. Rangel. Charlie was a great mentor and a wonderful friend. As long as we remember the Affordable Care Act, we will remember Charlie B. Rangel.  May he rest in peace. https://t.co/vouygYewjY

Proud to announce the reintroduction of the Second Chance Reauthorization Act of 2025! Thousands in Chicago & over 442,000 nationwide have benefited since I authored the original law in 2008.
Reentry is a right, not a privilege. #SecondChanceAct #JusticeReform #IL07 https://t.co/7VXLghYl7l

The criminal charge against Rep. LaMonica McIver is outrageous, unjust, and politically motivated.

As a Member of Congress, she has the constitutional authority to inspect federal facilities unannounced. She was upholding her oath—not breaking the law.
#IStandWithMcIver https://t.co/fUsDsBXyad

The House Ways and Means tax bill released today is skewed in favor of rich people, is even more costly than the original 2017 law, and fails to deliver for working-class families and small businesses. https://t.co/ICHYbPNPzm
Just in! Congressman Danny K. Davis at Ways and Means budget hearing standing up for children, Social Security, Medicaid and Healthcare. HANDS OFF! https://t.co/zyDDJrYKk7
